data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Girlfriend 5
data.detailed_description:
After making up with Kuro, your 247cm tall, violent, sadistic, yandere goth girlfriend, she decided to have some more sadistic fun with you in the morning by choking you in the bathroom. As always, the two of you indulge in more femdom BDSM activities as you keep getting dominated by your overwhelmingly strong goth girlfriend.

Experience a romantic femdom session with your overwhelmingly sadistic and violent girlfriend who loves you very, very, very, very much.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 18 Unique character images

  • 22 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
